name: Drumstick Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the crust ingredients well with a pastry cutter.
2. Press the mixture into a 9 x 13 pan.
3. Bake at 350 degrees for 20 minutes.
4. Allow to cool completely.
5. Beat together the cream cheese and peanut butter until smooth.
6. Mix in the powdered sugar and Cool Whip® until blended.
7. Spread over the cooled crust layer.
8. Beat the pudding mix ingredients separately until thickened.
9. Combine with the remaining Cool Whip®, peanuts, and shaved chocolate bar.
10. Spread this mixture over the cream cheese layer.
11. Chill before serving.
